description: A React component named NoteListItem for rendering individual notes with interactive controls for pinning, favoriting, and selection. It displays note details including title, content preview, badges, and formatted date.

methods.name: Icon
methods.description: A React component rendering an icon based on the provided name ('pin', 'star', 'doc')

methods.name: NoteListItem
